questions.question: Multiply: 2x(x + 4)
questions.explanation: Distribute 2x to both terms: 2x · x = 2x² and 2x · 4 = 8x.

questions.question: Find all zeros of the polynomial p(x) = x² - 9
What is the degree of the polynomial 5x⁴ + 3x² + 7?
questions.explanation: The degree is the highest power of x, which is 4.

questions.question: Subtract: (6x² - 2x + 5) - (3x² + 4x - 1)
questions.explanation: Distribute the negative and combine like terms: 6x² - 3x² = 3x², -2x - 4x = -6x, and 5 - (-1) = 6.
